hero.subhead: Face-to-face video practice for Parts 1, 2, and 3. Get a band score and a plan built from your mock.

session.previewLabel: Example live speaking session with band scores
session.examinerPrompt: Describe a place where you like to read. You have one minute to prepare.

socialProof.line: Built for IELTS · Official 4 criteria · AI video

problem.headline: The speaking test is the one you can't cram
problem.body: The IELTS Speaking test is an 11–14 minute face-to-face interview. There is no text to read. The examiner listens, follows up, and reacts to what you say. Reading sample answers won't prepare you for that.

howItWorks.headline: How it works
howItWorks.subhead: Three steps. Start in under a minute.

steps.title: Take a full mock
steps.body: Parts 1, 2, and 3 with an AI video examiner, just like test day.

steps.title: See your band on 4 criteria
steps.body: Fluency, Lexical resource, Grammar, and Pronunciation.

steps.title: Follow your daily plan
steps.body: Practice targets your weak areas from each mock.

differentiator.headline: Not audio flashcards — a person asks you questions
differentiator.body: SpeakLab puts you in a video conversation with an AI examiner. You hear the question, you answer out loud, and you get feedback on what you actually said — not a multiple-choice guess.

visual.prompt: Tell me about a time you helped someone.

personalization.headline: Every mock updates your plan
personalization.body: After each mock, SpeakLab finds your weakest criterion and part. Your daily sessions focus there — Part 2 cue cards if you run short, Part 3 discussions if abstract answers are hard, vocabulary drills if lexical resource is low.

mockVsPractice.headline: Exam mode when you're ready. Practice when you're learning.

rows.label: Hints
rows.practice: Scaffolds and feedback after each turn

forStudents.headline: Built for learners, not parents
forStudents.body: Plain English UI. Encouraging feedback — not red marks on every mistake. Mobile-first so you can practice between classes. Parents can get progress summaries; the app is for you.

pricing.headline: Start with a free mock
pricing.body: Your first full mock and band report are free. Unlock unlimited practice and mock exams with a plan — pricing TBD for launch.

items.q: Is this like the real IELTS Speaking test?
items.a: We simulate the same three-part structure, timing, and face-to-face format. The AI examiner asks follow-up questions and does not show you text to read during Parts 1 and 3 — similar to the real test.

items.q: How is my band score calculated?
items.a: Your mock is scored on the four official IELTS Speaking criteria: Fluency and coherence, Lexical resource, Grammatical range and accuracy, and Pronunciation.

items.q: Do I need a camera and microphone?
items.a: Yes. Speaking practice requires a microphone. A camera is recommended for the video examiner experience and to build comfort speaking on camera.
Your daily plan is personalized from your mocks, but you can explore practice by part anytime after signup.
English learners preparing for IELTS Speaking — especially students who want realistic practice without booking a human tutor for every session.
No. SpeakLab is independent prep practice. IELTS is a registered trademark of its owners.

footer.headline: Your next mock is 14 minutes away
footer.subhead: Sign up, take your free mock, and get a plan built for you.
